    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MetricsSource
    DashboardAutoConfiguration.metricsSource(DashboardMetricsService metricsService, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<DashboardHistoryService> history, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<SnapshotStore> snapshotStore, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<ClusterSeriesStore> seriesStore, InstanceIdResolver instanceIdResolver)
    The metrics provenance seam (see the distributed-dashboard design).
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config with parameters of type MetricsSource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClusterSeriesSampler
    DashboardAutoConfiguration.clusterSeriesSampler(MetricsSource metricsSource, ClusterSeriesStore seriesStore)
    Reset-aware sampler that feeds the cluster series ring from the merged aggregate; shared-store mode only.

  • Uses of MetricsSource in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source that implement MetricsSource
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    LocalRegistryMetricsSource
    Default MetricsSource: the figures come from this instance's in-process MeterRegistry, via DashboardMetricsService.

  • Uses of MetricsSource in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.prometheus

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.prometheus that implement MetricsSource
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PrometheusMetricsSource
    Cluster-wide MetricsSource that aggregates the failover.* meters across every instance via the Prometheus HTTP API (design doc / distributed-dashboard design, Option A).
    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.prometheus with parameters of type MetricsSource
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    PrometheusMetricsSource(PrometheusClient client, MetricsSource fallback, DashboardProperties.Health thresholds)
     

  • Uses of MetricsSource in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore that implement MetricsSource
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SharedStoreMetricsSource
    Cluster-wide MetricsSource for cluster.mode=shared-store: it merges the live per-instance snapshots held in a SnapshotStore into one aggregate, using the same MetricsKpis math as every other source, so the shapes and rates are identical to local / Prometheus.
    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore with parameters of type MetricsSource
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ClusterSeriesSampler(MetricsSource source, ClusterSeriesStore store, int intervalSeconds)
     
     
    SharedStoreMetricsSource(SnapshotStore store, DashboardProperties.Health thresholds, MetricsSource fallback, int maxInstances)
     
     
    SharedStoreMetricsSource(SnapshotStore store, DashboardProperties.Health thresholds, MetricsSource fallback, int maxInstances, ClusterSeriesStore seriesStore)
